subcodes.first_line: O seeker after the good-pleasure of the Divine Friend! Some time ago a letter was dispatched, and now, as His honor Haji Muhammad from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طالب رضای حضرت دوست چندی پیش خطی ارسال گردید و حال چون جناب حاجی محمد از
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @light and darkness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
